settings.section.imChannel.title: IM Channel
settings.section.imChannel.subtitle: Configure the Feishu/Lark private-chat entry point and runtime status.
settings.imChannel.title: IM Channel
settings.imChannel.description: Configure a Feishu/Lark private-chat entry point for binding and controlling existing sessions with /list and /use.
settings.imChannel.enableDescription: When enabled, the app starts the Feishu/Lark private-message listener with the current credentials.
settings.imChannel.domainDescription: Choose Feishu China or Lark international.
settings.imChannel.appIdDescription: The App ID of your Feishu/Lark custom app.
settings.imChannel.appSecretDescription: The app secret used to start the IM adapter.
settings.imChannel.allowedUsersDescripti: One Feishu/Lark user ID per line. The first version only supports private chats, not group chats.
settings.imChannel.status.title: Status
settings.imChannel.error.missingCredenti: Enter both App ID and App Secret.
settings.imChannel.error.missingDeviceCo: The QR install response is missing a device code. Generate a new QR code.
settings.imChannel.error.readFailed: Failed to read IM channel configuration.
settings.imChannel.error.statusFailed: Failed to read IM channel status.
settings.imChannel.error.saveFailed: Failed to save IM channel configuration.
settings.imChannel.install.title: Scan to configure Feishu bot
settings.imChannel.install.description: Scan with {domain} to install the custom app. After authorization, App ID/App Secret are saved and the IM channel is enabled.
settings.imChannel.install.scanHint: Scan the QR code with Feishu/Lark and finish the authorization steps.
settings.imChannel.install.success: QR configuration completed and credentials were saved.
settings.imChannel.install.expired: The QR code expired. Generate a new one.
settings.imChannel.install.qrcodeFailed: Failed to generate the install QR code.
settings.imChannel.install.pollFailed: Failed to poll the QR authorization result.
settings.imChannel.router.noBinding: No session bound. Send /list to view sessions, then use /use <id> to bind.
settings.imChannel.router.notWritable: Session not writable. Please open or resume it in the desktop app first:
settings.imChannel.router.noSessions: No sessions available. Please create a session in the desktop app first.
